title: The Race Against the Cage — Closing Beat
description: Citizens, fighters, and the Straw Hat allies push back against the Birdcage as Luffy and Law continue the fight.
scene: On pages 16–19, Luffy, Doflamingo, Trebol, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We lifted doffy up as our King and showed his grace and majesty to his under-lings!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But us five, we thought of him as one of us! As family!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: WaaGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've protected him all this while! Like his family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: - Re-pregnancy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Behe! I bet you forgot that my beto-beto goo is flammable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're the only one that thinks that, Trebol.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What a AAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: From where I stand, you and your attempts at playing the trustworthy staff leader are nothing more than...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The foolish flailings of a puppet whose strings Doflamingo is happily pulling!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Nnight!!! F... F...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Foolish Flailings ...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oi! Don't let him bait you, Trebol!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Law's got his room up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't be silly! What the hell could this half-dead nobody do!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's even further tied down with my beto-beto goo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He won't be able to move a muscle to resist!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Now, just try and open that mouth of yours once more!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll drive this through your throat and skewer you like the piece of meat you are!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: If I leave the both of you to Straw Hat-ya...{whereze}

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: {Cough} ...I happen to be the captain of my own ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I won't be able to face my own men!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Flick

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: tact!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: His arm!?

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Pikya AAAa!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: What-!? He's bleeding after getting cut!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Level 4 flower fields

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Hah-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: What's the matter, Leo?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Smile factory

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: What's everyone's deal!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: All of you suddenly looked towards the city, in Union!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I..can't really explain it other than...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: My heart suddenly feels...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: lighter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: This ain't the time for waxing poetic bullshit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: We've finished destroy- Ing the factory, now we've gotta haul our asses away from that shrinking cage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Ah! Roger that, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Where did that skinny- ass guy show up from!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: So that's why my punches went straight through him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Gahck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: You damned fool...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Cur... se... you... Law...»weezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezezeze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Shit! He's gonna light all this goo on fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: You will be joining me in hell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: An unexpected self-destructive- tion! What has become of law in that huge explosion!?

summary: This part focuses on the race against the cage, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
